title: Ice Cube Trays, 2 packs Ice Cube Moulds with No-Spill Removable Lid, Easy-Release Silicone and Flexible Ice Trays for Freezer, Whiskey, Cocktail and Drink (2pack Blue&Green)
features: [Food grade safety Material] Made of silicone and PP material, 100% BPA Free high quality materials safe and durable .

[Multiple usage] The ice cube is necessary in bar to cool cocktails, whiskey, tequila, vodka. And it is a useful tool at home for other homemade beverage or various ice snack like froze soup, ice cream or flower ice cube.

[Stackable design] These covered ice cube trays come with practical lids, which allows you to stack them in the freezer and save tons of space. The lids also keep the freezer smell and taste out of the water, so you can enjoy clear and clean ice cubes.
[Easy removal] TPE material shapes the bottom well, which makes it easy to release ice cubes. Each flat cube compartment is separate from others so you can easily push from the bottom.

[Quality service] If the ice cube trays didn't work well for you, please contact us and willing to provide the better solution for every dear customer! All your questions will be replied to within 24hrs.
